calendar.matters:
Hearing On Petitioner'S Compliance With Code Of Civil Procedure Section 1279.5.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2008 Off Calendar

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Frank J. Drago, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ben Lunine, Esq. appeared with petitioner Troy Swell Stover, who was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Misty Tara Stover.

Matter is continued to September 24, 2008 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for hearing on compliance with CCP Section 1279.5.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Off Calendar
